title: Basilisk applies source-linked 5 DOT per turn cycle

card.rawText: While on the field, the target creature receives 5 damage once per turn cycle, until this card leaves the field.

plan.title: Basilisk applies source-linked 5 DOT per turn cycle
plan.summary: Apply Basilisk DOT to a target and verify end-of-combat tick and cleanup when Basilisk leaves field.

notes: Basilisk is on player_1 field. Target player_2 primary creature with 100 HP.

steps: Activate/apply Basilisk effect targeting player_2 primary creature.
Advance to end of Combat Phase for the relevant tick window.
Advance another turn cycle to end of Combat Phase.

expectedAssertions.label: DOT status exists and is source-linked
No further DOT damage after cleanup

manualVerification: Confirm duplicate Basilisk DOT does not stack unless previous source is gone.
riskNotes: Turn-cycle timing and end-of-combat trigger may be implemented differently.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Supported DOT route; focus on source-linked cleanup and non-stacking.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
